annotation_policy: See attachment_gold_annotation_spec.md for full rules. Singular form, lowercase, merged synonyms, no enumeration context.

gold_attachments.label: Aurex ModulePad-495
gold_attachments.rationale: Named battery module platform — top-level asset

gold_attachments.label: compression pad
gold_attachments.rationale: Compressible pad between modules — component

gold_attachments.label: pad section
gold_attachments.rationale: Localized region of a compression pad — component subsection

gold_attachments.label: pad edge
gold_attachments.rationale: Edge boundary of compression pad — component feature

gold_attachments.label: module face
gold_attachments.rationale: Physical surface of battery module — component surface

gold_attachments.label: module interface
gold_attachments.rationale: Interface between module and pad — component connection

gold_attachments.label: compression member
gold_attachments.rationale: Structural part applying compression force (e.g. strap/plate) — component

gold_attachments.label: harness
gold_attachments.rationale: Adjacent wiring harness — component

gold_attachments.label: vent hardware
gold_attachments.rationale: Ventilation-related hardware — component

gold_attachments.label: module stack
gold_attachments.rationale: Assembled stack of modules — component assembly

gold_attachments.label: pad witness
gold_attachments.rationale: Compression imprint left by pad — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: pad coverage
gold_attachments.rationale: Extent of pad covering module face — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: thickness
gold_attachments.rationale: Pad thickness dimension — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: edge alignment
gold_attachments.rationale: Alignment of pad edge relative to module — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: overlap
gold_attachments.rationale: Degree of pad overlap with module face — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: missing pad
gold_attachments.rationale: Pad absent where expected — fault

gold_attachments.label: shifted pad
gold_attachments.rationale: Pad migrated from intended position — fault (merges migrated pad)

gold_attachments.label: folded edge
gold_attachments.rationale: Edge of pad folded under load — fault

gold_attachments.label: folded pad
gold_attachments.surface_form: pad that has migrated or folded under load
gold_attachments.rationale: Entire pad folded — fault (distinct from folded edge)

gold_attachments.label: uneven witness
gold_attachments.rationale: Non-uniform compression imprint — fault indicator

gold_attachments.label: damaged pad section
gold_attachments.rationale: Physically damaged portion of pad — fault

gold_attachments.label: trapped harness
gold_attachments.rationale: Harness caught under pad — fault

gold_attachments.label: memory-set pad
gold_attachments.rationale: Pad with permanent deformation from prior compression — fault

gold_attachments.label: weak edge
gold_attachments.rationale: Pad edge that reopens after settling — fault
